message: I need to get from NYC to London next Thursday, back Monday, business class, prefer to land in the morning, budget is flexible.
Necesito ir de Buenos Aires a Miami, business, lo antes posible, una persona.
Can you find me a first class seat from New York to London? Money is no object, I want the most comfortable option.
two of us, NYC to London, business, leaving thursday
Hola, quiero volar de Nueva York a Londres en clase ejecutiva, salgo el jueves y prefiero llegar temprano.
Need a business class flight EZE to MIA for one passenger, flexible on dates.
